history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young man with dark, messy hair and glasses stands next to a black motorcycle at night. He is wearing a black t-shirt with a graphic design on the back that says "MOURTENCE" and features abstract shapes and text like "MORE LOVE" and "LOVE AND PEACE". He has his hand to his mouth, looking pensively to the side. He is also wearing patterned pants. The background shows a dimly lit street with some buildings and trees, and flags with red and white stripes are visible on a pole to the left. The lighting is dark and atmospheric, with some streetlights casting a soft glow. The overall mood is contemplative and slightly mysterious.
